meta.description: Storit · tolli · Picktory · econoup. A Pohang-based studio running four product experiments at once.

about.heading:
We experiment with content
people visit every day.
about.lead: Started in December 2025 at the Handong University incubator. We run Storit, tolli, Picktory, and econoup in parallel and let the market guide what sticks.

projects.mainCopy: From reading webtoons to playing them. A community where quizzes and rewards bring fans together.
projects.p2Copy: A daily verse at your fingertips. Bible memorization, game-like.
projects.p3Copy: K-content through guessing. Prediction and reasoning for fans.
projects.p4Copy: Economics in five minutes a day. Habit-forming learning.

contact.heading: Looking for people to experiment with.
contact.subtitle: Partnerships, collabs, and general inquiries welcome.
